name: Valid credentials redirect to app
criteria: Login form accepts email and password
Correct credentials redirect away from /auth/login
User is not returned to the login page
error_message: E   AssertionError: Expected to be signed in but URL is: http://localhost:3000/auth/login/

steps.description: Enter valid player credentials and submit

steps.error: AssertionError: Expected to be signed in but URL is: http://localhost:3000/auth/login/

name: Wrong password shows error message
criteria: Submitting an incorrect password shows an inline error
User remains on the login page
No redirect occurs

name: Empty email prevents form submission
criteria: Submitting with a blank email field does not navigate away
Client-side validation fires before network request

steps.description: Fill only password, leave email blank

name: Unknown email shows authentication error
criteria: A non-existent account returns an error
No crash or unhandled exception occurs

name: Login page has signup link
criteria: A 'Sign Up' or 'Create Account' link is visible on the login page
Clicking it navigates to /auth/signup

steps.description: Click signup link and verify navigation
steps.error:
AssertionError: assert '/auth/signup' in 'http://localhost:3000/auth/login/'
 +  where 'http://localhost:3000/auth/login/' = <Page url='http://localhost:3000/auth/login/'>.url
 +    where <Page url='http://localhost:3000/auth/login/'> = <tests.e2e.pages.auth_page.AuthPage object at 0x000002AD61D72520>.page

name: Login page has forgot-password link
criteria: A forgot-password link is visible on the login page

name: Signup form renders all required fields
criteria: First Name field is present
Last Name field is present
Email field is present
Password field is present

name: Weak password shows strength indicator
criteria: Typing a weak password surfaces a visual strength indicator
Indicator appears without form submission

steps.error:
AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible
Actual value: None
Error: element(s) not found 
Call log:
  - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 3000ms
  - waiting for get_by_text("Weak").or_(locator(".password-strength, [data-testid='pw-strength']")).first

name: Duplicate email returns error on signup
criteria: Registering with an already-used email shows an error
No account is created
error_message: E     - waiting for get_by_role("main").get_by_role("button", name="Sign Up")

steps.description: Submit form with an existing email
steps.error:
TimeoutError: Locator.click: Timeout 10000ms exceeded.
Call log:
  - waiting for get_by_role("main").get_by_role("button", name="Sign Up")

name: Forgot password form renders correctly
criteria: Email field is present
Submit button is present

name: Unknown email handled gracefully on password reset
criteria: Submitting an unknown email does not crash the page
A confirmation or success message is shown
error_message: E     - waiting for get_by_role("button", name="Send Reset Email")

steps.error:
TimeoutError: Locator.click: Timeout 10000ms exceeded.
Call log:
  - waiting for get_by_role("button", name="Send Reset Email")

name: Sign out redirects to login or home
criteria: Clicking sign-out removes the authenticated session
User is redirected to /auth/login or the home page
error_message: E     - waiting for get_by_role("button", name="Sign Out").or_(get_by_role("menuitem", name="Sign Out"))

steps.error:
TimeoutError: Locator.click: Timeout 10000ms exceeded.
Call log:
  - waiting for get_by_role("button", name="Sign Out").or_(get_by_role("menuitem", name="Sign Out"))
